controls.title: Information Gathering
controls.description: Reconnaissance of the application, its infrastructure, entry points, and technology fingerprint.

controls.title: Configuration and Deployment Management Testing
controls.description: TLS configuration, HTTP methods, security headers, infrastructure and platform configuration.

controls.title: Identity Management Testing
controls.description: Account provisioning, role definitions, registration, and user/username enumeration.

controls.title: Authentication Testing
controls.description: Credential transport, default credentials, lockout, bypass, weak recovery, and MFA.

controls.title: Authorization Testing
controls.description: Directory traversal, privilege escalation, insecure direct object references (IDOR/BOLA), OAuth.

controls.title: Session Management Testing
controls.description: Session token attributes, fixation, CSRF, logout, and session timeout handling.

controls.title: Input Validation Testing
controls.description: XSS, SQL/NoSQL/command injection, SSRF, SSTI, and deserialization flaws.

controls.title: Testing for Error Handling
controls.description: Improper error handling and stack-trace/verbose error disclosure.

controls.title: Testing for Weak Cryptography
controls.description: Weak transport encryption, padding oracles, and weak or misused cryptographic algorithms.

controls.title: Business Logic Testing
controls.description: Workflow abuse, race conditions, request replay, and file-upload abuse.

controls.title: Client-Side Testing
controls.description: DOM-based XSS, postMessage, clickjacking, CORS misconfiguration, and web storage.

controls.title: API Testing
controls.description: Security testing specific to web APIs (added in v4.2).
